voteQuestion: What should TribeLog build next for Workouts?
positioning: Training insights only. No care-condition or guaranteed outcome claims.
privacyPrinciples: Private workout details stay private by default.
Public share cards require explicit user action.
A shared card may remain saved outside TribeLog after a user shares it, even if the original card is later deleted.
Aggregates should show trends without exposing raw workout logs to other users.
Insufficient-data states should explain what is missing without shaming the user.

voteOptions.label: Muscle volume heat maps
voteOptions.description: Show weekly training distribution by muscle group using completed workout volume.
voteOptions.releaseShape: Private insight first, shareable only by explicit export.
voteOptions.insufficientDataCopy: Log a few more workouts to unlock your first weekly muscle map.

voteOptions.label: Progressive overload suggestions
voteOptions.description: Offer conservative next-session reps or weight suggestions from the user's own history.
voteOptions.releaseShape: Private suggestion with plain explanation and easy ignore.
voteOptions.insufficientDataCopy: Log this exercise across a couple of weeks before TribeLog suggests the next step.

voteOptions.label: Bigger exercise library
voteOptions.description: Expand the official library from 50 movements toward 200+ exercises with reviewed assets.
voteOptions.releaseShape: Backend-driven catalog expansion in reviewed batches.

voteOptions.label: Shareable workout insight cards
voteOptions.description: Create user-controlled screenshot cards for workouts, PRs, volume, and plan milestones.
voteOptions.releaseShape: Private preview first, explicit user share only.
voteOptions.insufficientDataCopy: Finish one workout to create your first share card.

metrics.definition: Sum of reps multiplied by weight for completed sets, grouped by primary muscle and calendar week.
metrics.trustBoundary: Server aggregation recommended before public release.
metrics.privacy: Owner-only read. Public cards must use rounded or bucketed values.

metrics.definition: Comparison of recent completed sets for one exercise against prior best or recent average.
metrics.trustBoundary: Server or deterministic local preview; final trusted values should be reproducible.
metrics.privacy: Owner-only read. No automatic public posting.

metrics.definition: Count of published official exercises by category, muscle, equipment, and level.
User-approved snapshot of selected workout summary fields.
metrics.trustBoundary: Client renders preview; user explicitly shares.
metrics.privacy: No precise timestamps, private notes, or unselected exercise details by default. Shared cards may remain saved outside TribeLog after sharing.
